entries.title: Parts of Speech
entries.content: Noun, verb, adjective, adverb, pronoun, preposition, conjunction, interjection. Foundation of grammar analysis.

entries.title: Etymology
entries.content: Study of word origins and history. English borrows from Latin, Greek, French, Germanic roots.

entries.title: Phonetics vs Phonology
entries.content: Phonetics: physical sounds of speech. Phonology: sound patterns in a language system.

entries.title: Figurative Language
entries.content: Non-literal meaning: metaphor, simile, hyperbole, personification, oxymoron. Common in literature and persuasion.

entries.title: Language Families
entries.content: Indo-European (English, Hindi, Spanish), Sino-Tibetan (Chinese), Afro-Asiatic (Arabic), Niger-Congo, Austronesian.
